---
title: "Homework 11"
author: "Angela McMahon"
date: "4/12/2026"
output: 
  html_document: 
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(nycflights13)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
data(flights)
```


```{r}
flight_count <-flights%>%
  count(origin, dest)
flight_count%>%
  head(n=6)%>%
  kable()
```



```{r}
flight_count%>%
  left_join(airports, join_by(origin== faa))%>%
  rename(origin_lat= lat, origin_long= lon)%>%
  relocate(origin_lat, origin_long, .after=origin)
```
